effect.box_left_inset: inset from the left by half the badge width (W/2 + 24px left padding to clear overhanging badge half plus gap)
effect.width: everything else stays full content width

quotes: The blue box itself is **inset from the left by half the badge width** so the badge's outer half has room
Everything else stays full content width.

effect.prohibition: Never simplify either the box or badge accent shape to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

quotes: Never simplify either to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

effect.rationale: without it the badge looks flat and pasted-on
effect.requirement: The white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow on every instance so it lifts off the blue box

quotes: This shadow is required on every instance; without it the badge looks flat and pasted-on.
The blue box itself is **inset from the left by half the badge width** so the badge's outer half has room
